ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Shop__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Indonesia'), ISPICKVAL(Shop__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Chile'), ISPICKVAL(Shop__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense South Africa'), ISPICKVAL(Shop__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Thailand'), ISPICKVAL(Shop__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Vietnam') ), TEXT(Shop__r.Sales_Region__c)<>TEXT(Product__r.sales_region__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Store Sales Region and Product Sales Region mismatch. Please reselect the Product.
